notes: [New] Supply Points — 12 fixed POIs across Los Santos and Blaine County with free item collection
[New] Supply Points — collect items by entering a 65 radius green leaf marker
[New] Supply Points — 30-minute per-player cooldown after each collection
[New] Supply Points — fully configurable via config/supply.lua (add/remove/reposition)
[New] Supply Points — reward pool (weighted): 3× Fiber Net (50%), 5× Fiber Net (20%), 1× Berry Bait (25%), 1× Energy Snare (5%)
[New] Supply Points — each collection grants +25 XP
[New] Phone integrations — fixes for Yflip and Yphone
[New] Phone integrations — support added for codem-phone and cylex-phone
[New] 6 new creatures — Dragon and Bug types with 4-stage evolution lines
[New] New Dragon evolution line — Drakling → Wyrmite → Dracolord
[New] New Bug evolution line — Grublet → Pincermid → Beetorax
[Fix] Nexus hourly rewards not being granted issue resolved
[Fix] Map pin label text overflow (Nexus/Supply Points) fixed
[Improvement] Capture net selection — now defaults to lowest tier and sorted visually from best to worst
